reviews.review_description:
The super hot slow time mechanic works very well and makes for a very strategic battle. The elemental magic and combinations are great! 

The game crashes every 20/30 minutes while I am on Act 2, it's like every second and third level. Please look into this developers, you have an amazing foundation right now!! I will edit this review once this issue is patched
An absolute belter of a game! Graphics are really good, gameplay mechanics work well and it can get really challenging, buy it!

reviews.review_title: Quickly became one of my favorite games
reviews.review_description:
I own a lot of games and I rarely leave reviews, but this one deserves one.  One of the main features of the game that is rarely mentioned is that it has the Super Hot (and other games) time stop/slow mechanics.  There is just so much going on, its hard to play slow.  Its a rogue-like , but don't let that throw you off.  Its $12 for the moment, just pull the trigger.

Its not an easy game, but you will get better.  There is a roadmap planned, but I can't find it.. Yet.. But I'm sure there is more to come.

For my review on Reddit, just search r/oculusquest for Hexwind, and you should see a review from Penguin.

The game doesn't start anymore. It crashes before it begins. I probably won't even receive a refund because I will have played for more than 2 hours.
 Update: I repurchased the game because the developers told me that the problem should be solved, but the problem persists. The refund is no longer available because it added the time from the old installation to that of the new one. I can neither play it nor get my money back. Can you do something about this?
Update 2: it work now. Just some other bug like: 1 time it's going freeze the game and sometime there's not spawn of the enemy, so i had exit the level handly. Thanks so much and i wish you good job.

I can’t even properly start the game—it often fails to launch at all.
On the rare occasion it does start, the performance is abysmal—constant frame drops, laggy controls, and painfully long load times make it impossible to actually enjoy.

developer_response.body: We're sorry you are experiencing issues with HexWind. Please contact us on discord (http://discord.gg/charmgames) so that we can work through this issue with you.

reviews.review_description: Yes!, I finally got around to this, I will be makeing videos on this game pretty soon as it has a lot of potential and the devs seem to have passion and good humor, definitly a must play rogue like
Lovely game. Well done 👌 Devs   for a very unique game. And the updates  are making this game special
Awesome roguelike!!!  Really fun, and dark!! Let's go!!!  🫠🤙

The game core gameplay is already so addictive that even with the early access phase it's hard to stop playing. The mix of heavy music, fast bunny hop like running plus shooting makes the unique combo of gameplay elements. So far it's little behind steam version as for the content, but it's coming as the developers already proved to be skillful team.

Looking forward for long time support!
I can see it becoming one of the best roguelike titles in VR ( next to In Death Unchained and Light Brigade)!

The game runs great, looks awesome, and the combat is pure fun. For an early access version, it really feels fleshed out.I love the design of the world, and the models are AAA. Keep up the great work!
